source._note: All v5.2 source frozen at this commit. Move suite 105/105 PASS pre-publish.

supersedes.reason: v5.2 wager-fairness rewrite. WagerMatch struct shape changed — added 4 fields (player_a_level, challenger_escrow, pending_challenger, pending_at). accept_wager replaced with the full handshake (request_accept_wager + approve_challenger + decline_challenger + withdraw_challenge + cancel_expired_challenge). New STATUS_PENDING_APPROVAL state. Abort codes 12-23 added. reclaim_stalled_wager participant escape hatch closes the centralized-referee single-point-of-failure. Struct field additions are not backward-compatible upgrades on Sui — fresh package id required, not an UpgradeCap-driven upgrade.

transferPolicy._status: PENDING — TransferPolicy<Item> not yet created by the publish itself. Requires separate PTB using the Publisher cap to (a) create the policy, (b) add the royalty rule via royalty_rule::add_to_policy, and (c) transfer the resulting TransferPolicyCap to TREASURY. v5.1 had this at 0x0483cd85…13f69f; v5.2 needs its own because TransferPolicy is typed by the new package's Item type.

display._status: PENDING — Display<Character> and Display<Item> not yet created. Requires separate PTBs using the Publisher cap. v5.1 had these at 0x94a85532…fc0885 (character) and 0x32bdda84…a5aa658 (item).

v5_2_scope.summary: Wager fairness ONLY — level bracket + creator approval + referee-liveness escape hatch. Scope locked by 2026-05-30 user direction; bundling decision (settle_wager_attested / sui::random / respec_character) deferred to v5.2.x or v5.3 publish.

newAbortCodes.14: EChallengerSlotTaken (defensive — unreachable via public API; tested via test_only force_status helper)
newAbortCodes.23: EWrongExpiryEntrypoint (judgment call — V5.2 spec §14.1; routes PENDING_APPROVAL callers to cancel_expired_challenge)

unchangedFromV51: character module (struct, mint, fight-result, allocate_points, fight-lock)
equipment module (13-slot loadout, slot_type enforcement, save_loadout, fight-lock)
item module (mint_item_admin, rarity stat budgets, slot_type rules)
arena: settle_wager, settle_tie, cancel_wager, admin_cancel_wager (WAITING/ACTIVE arms), cancel_expired_wager (WAITING/ACTIVE arms), OpenWagerRegistry
notBundled_pendingFutureRelease: settle_wager_attested — dual-sig settlement closing the TREASURY-key-holder trust assumption
WS Zod validation + rate-limiter (server, not chain)

tests._note: Every abort code 12-20 + 21/22/23 has a direct triggering test. Funds-invariant tests use odd-MIST stakes (777_777_777 / 333_333_333 / 123_456_789) to verify no rounding loss on merge / split / refund.

rarity_stat_budgets._comment: Unchanged from v5.1. Sum of all *_bonus fields + max_damage capped per rarity in mint_item_admin.

pendingPostPublish: Create TransferPolicy<Item> + add royalty_rule + transfer TransferPolicyCap to TREASURY (separate PTB; ~0.003 SUI based on v5.1)
Create Display<Character> + Display<Item> using the Publisher cap (separate PTBs; ~0.006 SUI based on v5.1)
Wire frontend + server config to new package id + new shared object ids + new caps (STEP 3, gated on user direction)
Mint v5.2 catalog into TREASURY kiosk OR migrate / re-list from v5.1 kiosk
Two-wallet live QA against v5.2 testnet — flagship paths from STATE_OF_PROJECT (full wager cycle, mutual-KO settle_tie, level-bracket abort copy, creator approval flow, reclaim_stalled_wager dry-run)

rollback._strategy: v5.1 (0x308645f3…3717) remains live on testnet — its package bytecode and shared objects are untouched. To revert v5.2: point frontend/server back to the v5.1 package id + shared objects in deployment.testnet-v5.1.json. No on-chain cleanup needed; v5.2 objects become unreferenced but harmless. Both packages can run in parallel during the cut-over (v5.1 wagers settle under v5.1, new wagers under v5.2 — same pattern as the v5.0→v5.1 cutover).
